creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214964
gh-0.9.0.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 0.9.0 and updated distinfo.
 * Removed PLIST_FILES, added pkg-plist to handle custom
   custom installations.
 * Added extra docs to PORTDOCS accounting for new changes.
 * Optionally select COMPLETIONS, DOCS and MANPAGES via config
   and added according descriptions, build targets and subs in
   pkg-plist.
 * General tidyup.

Changelog:
 * https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/v0.9.0

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
